creator: ben@unpatched.de
text:
Created attachment 145912
Update irc/weechat to 1.0 and irc/weechat-devel to 1.1-dev

Update irc/weechat to 1.0. Also:

- Switch to $OPTION_USES etc.
- Remove now unneeded patches
- Add option to install ca-bundle

Update irc/weechat-devel to 1.1-dev. Also see above.

Patch attached.
